title: Hare Krishna mantra
intro: Read the Hare Krishna Mahamantra with meaning. Chant this Mahamantra with devotion to receive the grace of Lord Krishna.
description:
Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare
Hare Rama, Hare Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare॥
O Lord! O Energy of the Lord! Please engage me in Your service. (Hare refers to the divine energy of the Lord, while Krishna and Rama refer to the Supreme Personality of Godhead.)

faq.q1: When should Hare Krishna Mahamantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Hare Krishna Mahamantra can be chanted in the morning, evening, or at any time of the day.
faq.q2: How many times should Hare Krishna Mahamantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 108 times or according to one’s devotion.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Hare Krishna Mahamantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring inner peace, devotion, and positive energy.
faq.q4: Can anyone chant Hare Krishna Mahamantra?
faq.a4: Yes, this Mahamantra is considered suitable for everyone regardless of age or background.
faq.q5: Can Hare Krishna Mahamantra be chanted without initiation?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant this Mahamantra with sincerity and devotion.
